features.title: Workflow discovery and YAML parsing
features.parserSupport: recognized provider files are loaded from the repository
features.localBehavior: Piper discovers and parses recognized local pipeline files.
features.hostedDifferences: Hosted providers may discover additional configuration through repository settings or remote composition.
features.securityImplications: YAML is treated as untrusted input and is not executed during discovery.
features.fallback: Use a documented provider filename and valid YAML.

features.title: Job dependency graph
features.parserSupport: normalized needs and dependsOn edges
features.localBehavior: Piper builds a deterministic graph and rejects missing dependencies and cycles.
features.hostedDifferences: Provider-specific scheduling semantics are represented only where explicitly documented.
features.securityImplications: No pipeline code is executed while building the graph.
features.fallback: Correct missing or cyclic dependencies.

features.title: Local runner approximation
features.parserSupport: requested runner metadata is retained
features.localBehavior: Jobs run in local Linux Docker containers selected by Piper.
features.hostedDifferences: Hosted images, tool caches, operating systems, identity, and machine configuration are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Containers are not a perfect sandbox and may access configured workspace and network resources.
features.fallback: Perform final validation on the hosted provider.

features.title: Shell step execution
features.parserSupport: provider shell/script steps are normalized
features.localBehavior: Shell steps execute in the selected job container using Bash or supported PowerShell handling.
features.hostedDifferences: Shell defaults, installed tools, profiles, and operating-system behavior can differ.
features.securityImplications: Pipeline scripts are arbitrary code with workspace access.
features.fallback: Choose a compatible image and explicit supported shell.

features.title: Service containers
features.parserSupport: common image, environment, aliases, ports, and startup timeout fields
features.localBehavior: Services run on an isolated per-job Docker network with health/startup checks.
features.hostedDifferences: Provider networking, DNS, option parsing, and lifecycle details can differ.
features.securityImplications: Services execute untrusted images and may expose configured host ports.
features.fallback: Use explicit images, aliases, health checks, and local-safe ports.

features.title: Local artifacts
features.parserSupport: common artifact declarations and built-in handlers
features.localBehavior: Artifacts are copied into Piper-managed local storage with workspace path checks.
features.hostedDifferences: Cloud retention, permissions, compression, naming, and cross-run behavior are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Artifact paths are restricted to the prepared workspace and symlinks are rejected.
features.fallback: Inspect or export the local artifact and verify hosted behavior separately.

features.title: Local caches
features.parserSupport: common cache keys, paths, restore keys, and policies
features.localBehavior: Caches use Piper-managed per-repository local storage.
features.hostedDifferences: Provider scope, immutability, eviction, versioning, and backend behavior differ.
features.securityImplications: Cache paths are workspace-restricted; restored content remains untrusted.
features.fallback: Clear local caches or verify cache behavior on hosted CI.

features.title: Empty or unknown executable step
features.parserSupport: step is retained for diagnostics
features.localBehavior: A step without a recognized executable form is rejected with a structured support error.
features.hostedDifferences: A hosted provider may reject the YAML earlier or support another step type.
features.securityImplications: Rejecting unknown execution prevents false-success results.
features.fallback: Use a supported run, action, or task form.

features.title: Job without executable steps
features.parserSupport: jobs with no normalized steps are retained for diagnostics
features.localBehavior: A job with no locally executable steps is rejected instead of being reported successful.
features.hostedDifferences: A hosted provider may reject the configuration or obtain steps from a composition feature Piper does not resolve.
features.securityImplications: Rejecting prevents a missing template, include, or parser path from producing false success.
features.fallback: Add a supported step, resolve the configuration into a local fixture, or validate the job on hosted CI.

features.title: Step with multiple executable forms
features.parserSupport: provider step mappings with multiple run, action, task, checkout, or template forms are detected
features.localBehavior: An ambiguous step is rejected instead of executing one form and silently ignoring another.
features.hostedDifferences: Hosted providers normally reject mutually exclusive executable keys during validation.
features.securityImplications: Rejecting avoids executing a different command path than the author intended.
features.fallback: Keep exactly one executable form in each step.

features.title: Workflow and job metadata
features.parserSupport: name, job name, IDs, needs, and source locations
features.localBehavior: Metadata is represented in the model, graph, and UI.
features.hostedDifferences: Display formatting may differ from GitHub.
features.securityImplications: None beyond parsing untrusted YAML.
features.fallback: Use standard GitHub workflow metadata.

features.title: runs-on labels
features.parserSupport: scalar and list labels
features.localBehavior: Requested labels are displayed but do not select a hosted runner image.
features.hostedDifferences: GitHub label matching and hosted operating systems are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: A Linux local image may run code intended for another platform.
features.fallback: Select a compatible local image and validate platform-specific jobs on GitHub.

features.title: Workflow, job, and step env
features.parserSupport: literal mapping values at workflow, job, and step scope
features.localBehavior: Environment maps are merged and supported expressions are interpolated before execution.
features.hostedDifferences: GitHub coercion, context availability, and all environment-file semantics are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Environment values can contain secrets and are passed to job processes.
features.fallback: Use literal values or supported expressions and avoid relying on unavailable contexts.

features.title: defaults.run
features.parserSupport: job working-directory and shell defaults
features.localBehavior: Working-directory defaults are applied; supported shell selection is honored where available.
features.hostedDifferences: Workflow-level defaults and full GitHub shell templates are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Working directories remain restricted to the workspace at execution.
features.fallback: Declare explicit supported step working directories and shells.

features.title: Workflow triggers
features.parserSupport: trigger names and workflow_dispatch input metadata
features.localBehavior: Triggers are displayed; the user chooses a local event name and inputs.
features.hostedDifferences: Piper does not decide whether GitHub would start a workflow.
features.securityImplications: No GitHub API or credentials are needed for event selection.
features.fallback: Provide local event/input values and verify actual triggering on GitHub.

features.title: Job and step if conditions
features.parserSupport: if expressions with source location
features.localBehavior: A documented subset of status, comparison, boolean, string, context, and output expressions is evaluated.
features.hostedDifferences: GitHub coercion, functions, object semantics, and context completeness are not fully reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Evaluation failures reject execution rather than defaulting true.
features.fallback: Simplify the condition or validate unsupported syntax on GitHub.

features.title: Expression interpolation
features.parserSupport: ${{ }} in run, env, paths, outputs, and cache keys used by the runtime
features.localBehavior: Supported expressions are interpolated immediately before their local use.
features.hostedDifferences: Not every GitHub field or expression construct is evaluated.
features.securityImplications: Interpolated values can affect commands and paths; secrets remain best-effort redacted.
features.fallback: Use supported contexts or explicit local environment values.

features.title: Step and job outputs
features.parserSupport: job output definitions and GITHUB_OUTPUT records
features.localBehavior: Single-line and multiline step outputs feed steps and needs contexts; job outputs are interpolated after execution.
features.hostedDifferences: All environment-file commands, output limits, encoding, and edge cases are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Output values are untrusted and secret redaction is best effort.
features.fallback: Use GITHUB_OUTPUT with simple values and verify complex cases on GitHub.

features.title: Environment approval
features.parserSupport: job environment name
features.localBehavior: Environment jobs pause for explicit local approval and use restricted networking.
features.hostedDifferences: GitHub environment protection rules, reviewers, secrets, and deployment records are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Local approval is not provider authorization and must not imply production safety.
features.fallback: Use non-production credentials and validate protections on GitHub.

features.title: continue-on-error
features.parserSupport: literal step boolean
features.localBehavior: A failed step may continue the local job and emits an explicit continuation event.
features.hostedDifferences: Expression forms and GitHub outcome/conclusion distinctions are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Failures remain visible in structured events.
features.fallback: Use literal booleans and inspect step events.

features.title: Strategy matrix
features.parserSupport: static dimensions, include, exclude, fail-fast, and max-parallel
features.localBehavior: Static combinations expand deterministically into selectable local job instances.
features.hostedDifferences: Dynamic expressions and every include/exclude semantic are not guaranteed identical.
features.securityImplications: Expansion limits prevent unbounded local resource use.
features.fallback: Keep matrices static and below the configured expansion limit.

features.title: Job services
features.parserSupport: service image, environment, ports, and options metadata
features.localBehavior: Supported service fields use Piper's local service-container emulation; options are displayed but not applied.
features.hostedDifferences: GitHub service option parsing and networking differ.
features.securityImplications: Service images are untrusted and configured ports may be exposed locally.
features.fallback: Avoid relying on unsupported container options.

features.title: actions/checkout
features.parserSupport: actions/checkout references
features.localBehavior: Checkout is an explicit successful local emulation because the prepared repository is already mounted.
features.hostedDifferences: Fetch depth, ref selection, submodules, credentials, clean behavior, and sparse checkout are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: The mounted workspace may be writable depending on run settings.
features.fallback: Prepare the desired local revision before running Piper.

features.title: setup-node and setup-dotnet
features.parserSupport: setup-node and setup-dotnet version inputs
features.localBehavior: A compatible Node or .NET Docker image is selected when one version can represent the job.
features.hostedDifferences: Tool cache, authentication, architecture, caching, and multi-runtime images are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Selected images are pulled and executed locally.
features.fallback: Use one concrete supported runtime version per job.

features.title: Artifact and cache actions
features.parserSupport: upload-artifact, download-artifact, and cache inputs used locally
features.localBehavior: Supported inputs use Piper-managed local artifact and cache stores.
features.hostedDifferences: Hosted backend behavior and many action inputs are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Paths are workspace-restricted; restored data remains untrusted.
features.fallback: Use simple names, keys, and paths, then verify hosted behavior.

features.title: Local GitHub actions
features.parserSupport: local JavaScript, composite, and docker action metadata
features.localBehavior: Supported local JavaScript, composite run steps, and docker:// actions execute locally.
features.hostedDifferences: Nested uses steps, Dockerfile builds, action state, and full command protocol are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Local actions execute arbitrary repository code.
features.fallback: Use supported runtimes and run-only composite steps.

features.title: Remote GitHub actions
features.parserSupport: owner/repository[/path]@ref references
features.localBehavior: Remote actions require explicit consent, resolve to a commit, are cached, and emit provenance.
features.hostedDifferences: GitHub's download service, token context, and runner command protocol are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Downloaded third-party code executes locally; mutable references are warned.
features.fallback: Pin a commit SHA, review the source, or replace it with a local action.

features.title: Unsupported GitHub action runtime
features.parserSupport: unhandled action references or runtimes are retained
features.localBehavior: The action fails with a structured support error and is never reported successful.
features.hostedDifferences: GitHub may support the action or runtime.
features.securityImplications: Rejecting unknown runtimes prevents unreviewed fake-success behavior.
features.fallback: Use a supported action, local command, or hosted CI.

features.title: Reusable workflows
features.parserSupport: workflow_call and jobs.<id>.uses are detected
features.localBehavior: Reusable workflow execution is rejected before local job steps begin.
features.hostedDifferences: GitHub resolves inputs, secrets, nested calls, permissions, and outputs.
features.securityImplications: Remote reusable workflow code is not downloaded or executed.
features.fallback: Run the called workflow directly or validate the caller on GitHub.

features.title: Job container
features.parserSupport: jobs.<id>.container is detected
features.localBehavior: GitHub job-container semantics are rejected rather than silently replaced.
features.hostedDifferences: GitHub configures container credentials, options, volumes, networking, and shell behavior.
features.securityImplications: Arbitrary host mounts and options are not accepted.
features.fallback: Use Piper's selected job image or validate the container job on GitHub.

features.title: Permissions and concurrency
features.parserSupport: workflow and job keys are detected
features.localBehavior: The configuration is reported but does not alter local credentials or scheduling.
features.hostedDifferences: GitHub token permissions, concurrency groups, and cancellation are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Piper does not mint a GitHub token or imply provider authorization.
features.fallback: Review the values and validate policy behavior on GitHub.

features.title: Unknown GitHub workflow feature
features.parserSupport: unknown keys at recognized workflow, job, and step scopes
features.localBehavior: Unknown executable semantics are surfaced and rejected.
features.hostedDifferences: The key may be valid GitHub syntax not yet modeled by Piper.
features.securityImplications: Rejecting unknown behavior prevents silent success.
features.fallback: Consult the support reference or validate the feature on GitHub.

features.title: Jobs, stages, and needs
features.parserSupport: top-level jobs, stages/types, needs, and implicit stage edges
features.localBehavior: Jobs and explicit needs are normalized; missing needs use an adjacent-stage approximation.
features.hostedDifferences: GitLab stage scheduling, optional needs, and all DAG forms are not fully reproduced.
features.securityImplications: No pipeline code runs during graph construction.
features.fallback: Prefer explicit simple needs for deterministic local behavior.

features.title: Global and job variables
features.parserSupport: literal global and job variable mappings
features.localBehavior: Variables are merged into the local job environment.
features.hostedDifferences: Recursive expansion, protected/masked variables, file variables, and full precedence are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Values are passed to job processes; user secrets are only best-effort redacted.
features.fallback: Use explicit literal variables and verify precedence on GitLab.

features.title: Images and runner tags
features.parserSupport: root/default/job image and job tags
features.localBehavior: The selected image is used locally; tags are display metadata.
features.hostedDifferences: Runner selection, entrypoints, credentials, and executor behavior differ.
features.securityImplications: Images are pulled and executed locally.
features.fallback: Use a Bash-capable trusted image.

features.title: script, before_script, and after_script
features.parserSupport: global and job script blocks
features.localBehavior: Script blocks become ordered Bash steps; after_script currently follows normal success-gated step behavior.
features.hostedDifferences: GitLab after_script isolation, timeout, failure, and cancellation semantics are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Scripts are arbitrary code with configured workspace access.
features.fallback: Keep local scripts Bash-compatible and verify after_script edge cases on GitLab.

features.title: Job rules, only, and except
features.parserSupport: first matching simple rule, branch/tag forms, regex, and local changed-file patterns
features.localBehavior: A documented subset is converted to a local job condition.
features.hostedDifferences: Rule ordering, attributes, variable expansion, exists, compare_to, and many ref forms are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Evaluation errors fail rather than default true.
features.fallback: Use simple explicit conditions and verify complex rules on GitLab.

features.title: workflow: rules
features.parserSupport: workflow key is detected
features.localBehavior: Workflow rules are reported but do not decide whether the local pipeline exists.
features.hostedDifferences: GitLab can suppress or configure the entire pipeline before jobs are created.
features.securityImplications: No GitLab API or credentials are used.
features.fallback: Choose a local event explicitly and validate pipeline creation on GitLab.

features.title: Local includes
features.parserSupport: string and local include forms with nesting
features.localBehavior: Local include files are recursively merged with cycle detection before parsing.
features.hostedDifferences: All GitLab include merge nuances and integrity metadata are not guaranteed.
features.securityImplications: Included paths are restricted to the repository workspace.
features.fallback: Keep local include graphs small and acyclic.

features.title: Remote, project, and template includes
features.parserSupport: non-local include forms are detected and preserved
features.localBehavior: Piper does not fetch them and rejects execution because the resolved pipeline is incomplete.
features.hostedDifferences: GitLab fetches and merges remote/project/template content under provider trust rules.
features.securityImplications: No remote content is downloaded without a consent-aware resolver.
features.fallback: Vendor the include locally or validate on GitLab.

features.title: extends and hidden jobs
features.parserSupport: single or multiple parents and hidden job definitions
features.localBehavior: Jobs are resolved through reverse deep merging with cycle detection.
features.hostedDifferences: Every inheritance control and GitLab merge nuance is not yet covered.
features.securityImplications: Resolution is local and does not execute code.
features.fallback: Use acyclic local templates and inspect the resolved YAML.

features.title: default inheritance
features.parserSupport: default image plus visibility of the remaining default mapping
features.localBehavior: Only the default image is inherited; other default fields are reported as missing local semantics.
features.hostedDifferences: GitLab supports broader default inheritance and inherit controls.
features.securityImplications: Inherited images execute locally; ignored defaults can otherwise change commands, credentials, or cleanup behavior.
features.fallback: Declare non-image defaults directly on jobs or validate them on GitLab.

features.title: Top-level cache and services defaults
features.parserSupport: top-level cache and services keys are detected
features.localBehavior: Execution is rejected because these global defaults are not applied to jobs.
features.hostedDifferences: GitLab propagates deprecated top-level cache and services declarations to jobs.
features.securityImplications: Silently ignoring global services or cache content could change the code and dependencies used by a job.
features.fallback: Move cache and services declarations onto each job for local testing.

features.title: Services
features.parserSupport: image/name, alias/aliases, and variables
features.localBehavior: Services use Piper's local service-container network.
features.hostedDifferences: GitLab executor networking and service command/entrypoint behavior differ.
features.securityImplications: Service images are untrusted local code.
features.fallback: Use explicit aliases and trusted images.

features.title: Artifacts and cache
features.parserSupport: common paths, names, keys, restore behavior, policy, when, and expiry metadata
features.localBehavior: Common declarations use Piper-managed local stores.
features.hostedDifferences: Reports, exclusions, expiry enforcement, scopes, and cloud backends differ.
features.securityImplications: Paths are workspace-restricted and stored content remains untrusted.
features.fallback: Use simple paths and inspect local records.

features.title: Environments and manual jobs
features.parserSupport: environment name and when: manual
features.localBehavior: Piper pauses for explicit local approval and restricts deployment-job networking.
features.hostedDifferences: GitLab protected environments, deployment records, and permissions are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Approval is local only and does not authorize a real deployment.
features.fallback: Use non-production credentials and verify protections on GitLab.

features.title: allow_failure
features.parserSupport: literal job boolean
features.localBehavior: A failed local job can be converted to a successful scheduler result with an explicit event.
features.hostedDifferences: Exit-code forms and GitLab warning status semantics are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: The original failure remains visible in events.
features.fallback: Use literal booleans and inspect job_failure_allowed events.

features.title: dependencies, resource_group, coverage, retry, and timeout
features.parserSupport: these job keys are detected
features.localBehavior: Execution is rejected instead of silently ignoring job data flow, locking, reporting, retry, or timeout behavior.
features.hostedDifferences: GitLab implements each feature in its runner and scheduler.
features.securityImplications: Rejecting ignored policies prevents misleading success and uncontrolled execution.
features.fallback: Remove the feature for a local-only fixture or validate the job on GitLab.

features.title: parallel jobs and matrix
features.parserSupport: parallel is detected
features.localBehavior: Parallel expansion is rejected before execution.
features.hostedDifferences: GitLab creates numbered or matrix job instances and maps dependencies accordingly.
features.securityImplications: Rejecting prevents accidental unbounded or incomplete execution.
features.fallback: Create explicit local jobs or validate on GitLab.

features.title: Child and multi-project pipelines
features.parserSupport: trigger forms are detected
features.localBehavior: Triggered pipeline behavior is rejected locally.
features.hostedDifferences: GitLab can create child or remote project pipelines with provider-side permissions.
features.securityImplications: Piper never triggers a remote pipeline by default.
features.fallback: Open a local child file directly or validate the trigger on GitLab.

features.title: Unknown GitLab job feature
features.parserSupport: unknown keys at recognized workflow and job scopes
features.localBehavior: Unknown semantics are surfaced and rejected.
features.hostedDifferences: The key may be valid GitLab syntax not yet modeled.
features.securityImplications: Rejecting unknown behavior prevents silent success.
features.fallback: Consult the support reference or validate on GitLab.

features.title: Pipelines, stages, jobs, and dependencies
features.parserSupport: root steps/jobs, stages, displayName, dependsOn, and stage ordering
features.localBehavior: Azure structures are normalized into jobs and deterministic dependency edges.
features.hostedDifferences: Stage conditions, approvals, server jobs, and all dependency expressions are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: No pipeline code runs during normalization.
features.fallback: Use agent jobs with explicit dependencies.

features.title: Root, stage, job, and step variables
features.parserSupport: literal maps, name/value lists, and step env
features.localBehavior: Literal variables are merged and supported macros/expressions are evaluated at local runtime.
features.hostedDifferences: Variable groups, secret variables, precedence, compile-time insertion, and logging commands are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Values are passed to processes and may contain secrets.
features.fallback: Use explicit local values and verify complex precedence on Azure.

features.title: pool and vmImage
features.parserSupport: pool scalar, name, and vmImage
features.localBehavior: The requested pool/image is displayed but does not select a Microsoft-hosted image.
features.hostedDifferences: Azure agent demands, capabilities, operating systems, and hosted images are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: A Linux local image may run code intended for another platform.
features.fallback: Choose a compatible local image and validate platform-specific work on Azure.

features.title: Bash, script, CmdLine, and PowerShell
features.parserSupport: bash/script/pwsh/powershell steps and common script tasks
features.localBehavior: Scripts run through Bash or pwsh when available; CmdLine is approximated with Bash.
features.hostedDifferences: Windows cmd.exe, task wrappers, profiles, preferences, and agent logging commands differ.
features.securityImplications: Scripts are arbitrary code with workspace access.
features.fallback: Use explicit Bash or ensure pwsh exists in the image.

features.title: workingDirectory
features.parserSupport: step workingDirectory
features.localBehavior: Relative working directories are resolved below the prepared workspace.
features.hostedDifferences: Azure task-specific path defaults may differ.
features.securityImplications: Workspace escape attempts are rejected.
features.fallback: Use repository-relative paths.

features.title: checkout step
features.parserSupport: checkout steps
features.localBehavior: Checkout is an explicit successful local emulation because the prepared repository is already mounted.
features.hostedDifferences: Repository resources, clean, fetch, submodules, credentials, and persistence are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: The mounted workspace may be writable.
features.fallback: Prepare the desired local revision before running Piper.

features.title: Job and step condition
features.parserSupport: condition strings with source location
features.localBehavior: A subset of status, equality, and boolean functions is evaluated.
features.hostedDifferences: Compile-time expressions, all runtime functions, dependency outputs, and type coercion are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Evaluation failures reject execution rather than default true.
features.fallback: Use supported condition functions or verify on Azure.

features.title: Triggers, PRs, and schedules
features.parserSupport: trigger, pr, and schedules keys
features.localBehavior: Trigger metadata is displayed; the user supplies a local build reason.
features.hostedDifferences: Piper does not decide whether Azure would queue a pipeline.
features.securityImplications: No Azure service connection is contacted.
features.fallback: Select a local event and verify queueing behavior on Azure.

features.title: Parameters and compile-time expressions
features.parserSupport: parameters are detected
features.localBehavior: Execution is rejected because parameterized configuration is not resolved.
features.hostedDifferences: Azure expands typed parameters and compile-time template expressions before runtime.
features.securityImplications: Rejecting avoids executing an incorrectly resolved pipeline.
features.fallback: Create a resolved local fixture or validate on Azure.

features.title: Matrix strategy
features.parserSupport: named static matrix legs and maxParallel
features.localBehavior: Named legs expand deterministically into local job instances.
features.hostedDifferences: Dynamic strategy expressions and every Azure scheduling nuance are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Expansion limits constrain local resource use.
features.fallback: Keep matrix legs static and below the expansion limit.

features.title: Service containers
features.parserSupport: service image, environment, and ports
features.localBehavior: Services use Piper's local per-job Docker network.
features.hostedDifferences: Azure container resources, endpoints, options, and agent networking differ.
features.securityImplications: Service images execute locally and ports may be exposed.
features.fallback: Use trusted images and simple service configuration.

features.title: Script and runtime setup tasks
features.parserSupport: Bash, PowerShell, CmdLine, NodeTool, and UseNode handlers
features.localBehavior: Known tasks map to local shell execution or Node image selection.
features.hostedDifferences: Task versions, inputs, tool caches, logging commands, and platform behavior are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Task scripts and selected images execute locally.
features.fallback: Use documented inputs or replace the task with an explicit local command.

features.title: Artifact and cache tasks
features.parserSupport: PublishBuildArtifacts, DownloadBuildArtifacts, and Cache inputs used locally
features.localBehavior: Known handlers use Piper-managed artifact and cache stores.
features.hostedDifferences: Pipeline artifact services, scopes, retention, and many task inputs are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Paths are workspace-restricted and restored data remains untrusted.
features.fallback: Use simple names, keys, and paths, then validate hosted behavior.

features.title: Unknown Azure task
features.parserSupport: unknown task names and versions are retained
features.localBehavior: Unknown tasks fail with a structured support error.
features.hostedDifferences: Azure may provide the task through its marketplace or built-in catalog.
features.securityImplications: Piper never fakes successful execution of an unknown task.
features.fallback: Use a supported task or replace it with an explicit local command.

features.title: Templates and root extends
features.parserSupport: step template and root extends references are detected
features.localBehavior: Execution is rejected because templates are not expanded.
features.hostedDifferences: Azure resolves nested step, job, stage, variable, and extends templates.
features.securityImplications: Remote template code is not downloaded or executed.
features.fallback: Create a resolved local fixture or validate on Azure.

features.title: Repository, pipeline, package, and container resources
features.parserSupport: resources is detected
features.localBehavior: Execution is rejected because referenced resources are not resolved.
features.hostedDifferences: Azure authenticates and fetches configured external resources.
features.securityImplications: Piper does not use service connections or fetch remote resources.
features.fallback: Vendor required local content or validate on Azure.

features.title: timeoutInMinutes and cancellation timeout
features.parserSupport: job timeout keys are detected
features.localBehavior: Provider timeout declarations are rejected because only Piper's explicit local timeout settings are enforced.
features.hostedDifferences: Azure applies job and cancellation timeouts with agent semantics.
features.securityImplications: Ignoring a timeout could allow unintended long-running code, so Piper rejects it.
features.fallback: Configure Piper's local timeout explicitly and verify provider timeout behavior on Azure.

features.title: continueOnError
features.parserSupport: literal job and step booleans
features.localBehavior: Step and job failures can continue locally and emit explicit continuation/allowed-failure events.
features.hostedDifferences: Azure result states and expression forms are incomplete.
features.securityImplications: Original failures remain visible in structured events.
features.fallback: Use literal booleans and inspect events.

features.title: Deployment jobs
features.parserSupport: deployment job, environment, and runOnce deploy steps
features.localBehavior: Deployment jobs use a local approval gate and internal-only network.
features.hostedDifferences: Azure environments, checks, service connections, strategies, and deployment history are not reproduced.
features.securityImplications: Approval is local and must not be treated as production authorization.
features.fallback: Use non-production credentials and validate deployment controls on Azure.

features.title: Job container
features.parserSupport: job container is detected
features.localBehavior: Azure job-container semantics are rejected.
features.hostedDifferences: Azure configures container resources, endpoints, options, mounts, and agent initialization.
features.securityImplications: Arbitrary mounts and container options are not accepted.
features.fallback: Use Piper's selected job image or validate on Azure.

features.title: Unknown Azure pipeline feature
features.parserSupport: unknown keys at recognized workflow, job, and step scopes
features.localBehavior: Unknown semantics are surfaced and rejected.
features.hostedDifferences: The key may be valid Azure syntax not yet modeled.
features.securityImplications: Rejecting unknown behavior prevents silent success.
features.fallback: Consult the support reference or validate on Azure.
